overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy video game showing a wizard character in dark robes exploring a dimly lit Gothic castle corridor with stone arches and wall-mounted torches, passing detailed statues in alcoves along the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with torch-lit alcoves

events.description: gargoyle statue becomes visible in the illuminated alcove ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the stone corridor toward the first illuminated alcove

entered.detail: ornate stone archway ceiling extending down the corridor
dark stone wall with vertical architectural details
dark stone wall with alcove openings
wall-mounted torch casting warm orange light and shadows
stone gargoyle statue perched in an alcove niche
large stone slab flooring with subtle reflections

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow Gothic castle corridor with high arched ceilings and stone walls. A wall-mounted torch on the right illuminates the path ahead, revealing a gargoyle statue in an alcove that becomes visible as the character approaches.

events.description: character passes the gargoyle statue on the right and continues down the corridor
approaching the next wall torch on the left side illuminating the second alcove

agents.ego_description: continuing past the first statue and moving deeper into the corridor toward the next light source

entered.detail: wall-mounted torch on the left side approaching in the distance
tall stone statue of a robed figure holding a book in the next alcove

segments.scene_description: Having passed the gargoyle statue, the character continues down the corridor as the first torch falls behind. A new torch becomes visible on the left wall ahead, illuminating a second alcove containing a robed statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with second statue alcove

events.description: character passes the robed statue in the second alcove on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the second statue and continuing deeper into the dimly lit corridor

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the robed statue in the second alcove, illuminated by the left wall torch. As the character continues forward, both the statue and torch fall behind, leaving the corridor ahead in deeper shadow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dimly lit Gothic corridor that shifts between pockets of torchlight and deep shadow. It begins with the character walking beneath high arched ceilings, where a wall-mounted torch on the right reveals a gargoyle statue nestled in a stone alcove. As the character passes the gargoyle and the first light fades behind them, the camera advances toward a second torch on the left wall that illuminates a robed statue. The scene then shifts as the character moves past this second figure, leaving the light and the statue behind. Finally, the corridor ahead opens into deeper shadow as the last source of illumination recedes into the distance.
